meta.attribution: Product data attributed to Product Hunt.
meta.commercialUsage: Product Hunt API must not be used for commercial purposes without Product Hunt approval.

issues.title: 产品灵感日报 · 20 个新品

products.name: Acti
products.tagline: Agentic keyboard for mobile commands and search
products.summaryZh: 移动指令与搜索的智能键盘
products.descriptionZh: 输入所需内容。按住Acti Bar。Acti会理解你的意图，并在当前界面直接返回正确的结果、链接或操作。无需离开对话，即可使用Acti查询实时体育赛程、附近餐厅、Notion文档、LinkedIn个人资料、Meet链接、日历操作及自定义工作流。
products.description: Type what you need. Hold Acti Bar. Acti understands your intent and brings back the right result, link, or action - right where you are. Use Acti for live sports schedules, nearby restaurants, Notion docs, LinkedIn profiles, Meet links, Calendar actions, and custom workflows - without leaving the conversation.

products.name: Humalike
products.tagline: Give your AI agents the social intelligence they're missing
products.summaryZh: 为你的AI智能体补上缺失的社交智能
products.descriptionZh: 如今的模型已经足够强大、足够智能、足够快速。但我们仍觉得它们与所处的空间格格不入。Humalike正在为类人AI智能体构建行为基础设施——那些你的智能体一直缺失的社交技能与主动性。提供API、模型与基准测试。
products.description: Today's models are capable enough. Smart enough. Fast enough. But we still feel they don’t fit in the room. Humalike is building the behavioral infrastructure for humanlike AI agents. The social skills & proactiveness your agents have been missing. APIs, models, benchmarks.

products.name: Tabstack Browser Automation
products.tagline: Automate the web in your app or agent, no browser to host
products.summaryZh: 在你的应用或代理中自动化网页操作，无需托管浏览器
products.descriptionZh: 用自然语言向 /automate 下达任务，它就能驱动真实浏览器执行：导航网站、完成多步骤操作、填写表单、抵达仅通过交互才能渲染的页面。结果通过一次 API 调用流式返回。这是一个可直接调用的 API，无需安装框架。内置浏览器和 LLM，无需托管，无并发上限。基于无障碍树自动化，相比截图代理可节省 60% 至 80% 的 token 消耗。由 Mozilla 构建。临时运行，不会使用你的数据进行训练。
products.description: Give /automate a task in plain English and it drives a real browser to do it: navigate a site, click through a multi-step flow, fill a form, reach a page that only renders after interaction. The result streams back in one API call. It's an API you call, not a framework you install. Browser and LLM included, nothing to host, no concurrency ceiling. Accessibility-tree automation spends 60 to 80% fewer tokens than screenshot-based agents. Built by Mozilla. Ephemeral, no training on your data.

products.name: Claude Sonnet 5
products.tagline: AI that plans, acts, and gets work done
products.summaryZh: 能够规划、执行并完成工作的AI
products.descriptionZh: 我们迄今为止最具自主性的Sonnet，为编程和日常专业工作提供顶级智能。
products.description: Our most agentic Sonnet yet, with top-tier intelligence for coding and everyday professional work.

products.name: Adam CAD Copilot
products.tagline: AI CAD inside Onshape and Fusion
products.summaryZh: Onshape 和 Fusion 内置的 AI CAD
products.descriptionZh: Adam将AI CAD辅助功能引入机械工程师已使用的工具中。通过提示创建和编辑零件、参考所选几何体、清理特征树，并保持所有内容可编辑。全部原生集成于Onshape和Autodesk Fusion中。
products.description: Adam brings AI CAD assistance into the tools mechanical engineers already use. Create & edit parts with prompts, reference selected geometry, clean up feature trees, and keep everything editable. All natively inside Onshape and Autodesk Fusion.

products.name: MailAdept by mailwarm
products.tagline: AI Agents & Email deliverability experts on your team
products.summaryZh: AI智能体与邮件送达率专家，加入你的团队
products.descriptionZh: 邮件投递自动化管理。基于订阅的AI原生邮件投递服务，由AI代理与人类专家作为您团队的延伸，审计基础设施、修复问题、每日监控邮件健康度，并通过周报提升收件箱到达率。
products.description: Email deliverability on autopilot. A subscription-based, AI-native email deliverability service where AI agents and human experts work as an extension of your team to audit your infrastructure, fix issues, monitor email health daily, and improve inbox placement with weekly reporting.

products.name: Modelence Mobile Builder
products.tagline: Build mobile apps by chatting with AI
products.summaryZh: 通过AI对话构建移动应用
products.descriptionZh: Modelence App Builder 现已支持创建原生移动应用。与网页应用一样，只需描述您的需求，即可获得一个功能完整的移动应用，并与您的 Modelence 认证和后端同步运行。
products.description: Now Modelence App Builder has support for creating native mobile apps. Just like web apps, describe what you want and get a fully working mobile app, working in sync with your Modelence auth and backend.

products.name: Sequence Agentic
products.tagline: Money movement for AI agents
products.summaryZh: AI代理的资金流转
products.descriptionZh: Sequence是AI代理的金融执行层。与只读工具不同，你的代理通过Sequence API在所有银行账户、卡片、应用和贷款之间发送、拆分和路由真实资金。作用域API密钥确保代理从不持有你的凭证，服务端支出限制让你保持控制，完整审计日志记录每个操作。该基础设施已在受监管的轨道上经过生产环境验证，处理超过30亿美元资金。支持从Claude、n8n、Zapier等平台一键集成。
products.description: Sequence is the financial execution layer for AI agents. Unlike read-only tools, your agent uses the Sequence API to send, split, and route real money across all your bank accounts, cards, apps, and loans. Scoped API keys mean agents never hold your credentials, server-side spending limits keep you in control, and full audit trails log every action. The infrastructure is battle-tested in production on regulated rails, moving north of $3B. One-call integration from Claude, n8n, Zapier etc.

products.name: Fuser Apps
products.tagline: Vibecode apps, sites, & games on everyone's favorite canvas
products.summaryZh: Vibecode 应用、网站与游戏，尽在人人钟爱的画布之上
products.descriptionZh: 现在你可以在 Fuser 中直接构建应用，无需编写代码。Fuser 是一个端到端的创意引擎。你可以在画布上制作图像、视频、声音、3D 等内容。你的参考素材、生成内容、媒体和数据，都可以成为应用读取、响应并持续演进的来源。提示、生成、编辑、发布，一键完成。几分钟即可上线。立即体验：接下来一个月内，在 fuser.studio 上生成应用完全免费 💙
products.description: You can now build apps directly in Fuser—no code required. Fuser is an end-to-end creative engine. Make images, video, sound, 3D and more on canvas. Your references, generations, media and data can become something your app reads, responds to, and evolves from. Prompt, generate, edit, and ship in one click. Go live in minutes. Try it now: app generations are free for the next month on fuser.studio 💙

products.name: Mark by Airtop
products.tagline: Vibe automation for solo marketers
products.summaryZh: 面向独立营销人员的Vibe自动化
products.descriptionZh: 将你的网站交给Mark，它会研究你的业务，制定个性化GTM计划，并构建网络代理，自动化执行线索生成、数据丰富、外拓、SEO和Google Ads广告活动。使用Mark就像氛围编程，但专为销售和营销活动设计。基于Airtop的Agent Builder平台构建，Mark将每次自动化编译为确定性代码，因此其代理运行可靠，成本比逐步骤LLM代理低10-100倍。真正的营销自动化，只需输入文字即可构建。
products.description: Give Mark your website and it researches your business, creates a personalized GTM plan, and builds web agents that automate lead gen, enrichment, outbound, SEO, and Google Ads campaigns. Using Mark is like vibe coding, but for sales and marketing campaigns. Built on Airtop's Agent Builder platform, Mark compiles every automation into deterministic code, so its agents run reliably and 10-100X cheaper than LLM-per-step agents. Real marketing automations, built just by typing.

products.name: Gemini Omni Flash
products.tagline: High-quality video generation and conversational editing
products.summaryZh: 高质量视频生成与对话式编辑
products.descriptionZh: Gemini Omni Flash（gemini-omni-flash-preview）现已在 Gemini API 和 Google AI Studio 中面向开发者推出，原生支持基于文本、图像和视频输入的高质量视频生成及对话式编辑。该模型定价为每秒钟视频输出 0.10 美元，与 Veo 3.1 Fast 价格相同。
products.description: Gemini Omni Flash (gemini-omni-flash-preview) just rolled out to developers via the Gemini API and Google AI Studio, natively supporting high-quality video generation and conversational editing from a combination of text, image and video inputs. This model is priced competitively at $0.10 per second of video output, which is the same as Veo 3.1 Fast.

products.name: Claude Science
products.tagline: Your research partner for rigorous science
products.summaryZh: 你的严谨科学研究伙伴
products.descriptionZh: Claude Science是您进行科学研究的AI工作台。像一位经验丰富的科学家一样，贯穿您的研究全程，运行分析并追踪每一步骤。花更少的时间拼接流程，将更多精力投入科学本身。
products.description: Claude Science is your AI workbench for scientific research. Works through your research like a skilled scientist, running the analysis and tracing every step. Spend less time stitching pipelines together, and more time on the science.

products.name: OASIS 1 Ring
products.tagline: Whisper to write and touch to edit
products.summaryZh: 轻语书写，触控编辑
products.descriptionZh: OASIS Ring将我们的专利环形触控板与私密语音捕捉功能相结合，并集成了Wispr Flow。在年内推出有史以来最先进的环形触控板后，我们即将发布下一步产品：一款佩戴于手指的交互界面，让您无需触碰键盘即可私密低语、通过Wispr进行语音输入，并利用触控板编辑文本。
products.description: OASIS Ring combines our patented ring trackpad with private voice capture, integrated with Wispr Flow. After shipping the most advanced trackpad ever built into a ring this year, we’re launching our next step: an interface on your finger that lets you whisper privately, dictate with Wispr, and edit text with our trackpad without ever touching a keyboard.

products.name: RunInfra
products.tagline: Describe the AI model you need and get an optimized AI
products.summaryZh: 描述你需要的AI模型，获得优化后的AI。
products.descriptionZh: 告诉RunInfra你的需求，它就能构建生产级API。无需仪表盘，无需配置。用自然语言描述任意开源模型或完整应用。我们进行真实优化：基准测试GPU、量化模型、通过Forge智能体生成定制CUDA内核。运行速度更快、成本低于标准托管。构建语音（语音→AI→语音）、文档搜索、视觉或模型路由，全部在一个对话中完成。按百万Token计费。可缩至零。选择托管运行或使用自有GPU。
products.description: Tell RunInfra what you need and it builds the production API. No dashboards. No config. Describe any open source model or full app in plain language. We optimize it for real: benchmark GPUs, quantize the model, generate custom CUDA kernels with our Forge agent. It runs faster and cheaper than standard hosting. Build voice (speech → AI → speech), doc search, vision, or model routing, all in one chat. Pay per million tokens. Scale to zero. Run managed or on your own GPUs.

products.name: N71
products.tagline: Give all your AI agents one shared context
products.summaryZh: 为所有AI智能体提供统一的共享上下文
products.descriptionZh: 为统筹十余个AI智能体的知识工作者而生。🧠 你的工作情境瞬息万变：决策调整、交易推进、优先级每小时都在变化。然而每次新对话都从空白开始，各智能体互不知晓彼此已处理的内容。N71为它们提供持续更新的共享语境，连接你的工具后，它会维护一个实时知识图谱，智能体通过MCP读取该图谱，任何变化即刻同步。向任一智能体提问，它都已掌握最新信息。🔗
products.description: For knowledge workers orchestrating a dozen AI agents. 🧠 Your context never sits still: decisions shift, deals move, priorities change by the hour. Yet every new chat starts blank, and no agent knows what the others already worked out. N71 gives them one shared context that stays current, connect your tools and it maintains a living knowledge graph they read from over MCP, updated the moment anything changes. Ask any agent anything, and it's already caught up. 🔗

products.name: Metal
products.tagline: AI-driven operating system for raising venture rounds
products.summaryZh: AI驱动的操作系统，助力融资轮次
products.descriptionZh: 由a16z和YC投资，Metal为正在融资的创始人提供AI原生操作系统。从投资人发现、关系图谱到应用内融资助手，Metal帮助创始人以数据驱动和高精度的方式推进融资。该平台已被数百位获得a16z、YC、Techstars及其他顶级投资机构支持的高意向创始人积极使用。
products.description: Backed by a16z and YC, Metal offers an AI-native operating system for founders raising venture rounds. From investor discovery and relationship mapping to an in-app round copilot, Metal helps founders take a data-driven and high-precision approach. The platform is already being actively used by hundreds of high-intent founders backed by a16z, YC, Techstars and other top-tier investors.

products.name: Stigg 2.0
products.tagline: The usage runtime for AI products
products.summaryZh: AI产品的使用时长
products.descriptionZh: Stigg 是 AI 产品的用量运行时：位于应用与计费栈之间的实时执行与治理层。它在每个客户、用户、团队和代理尝试操作的瞬间，决定其可执行的操作。毫秒级信用检查、零透支、企业级治理及模块化 BYOC。计量、信用额度、权限与治理集成于单一运行时。在请求路径中执行，而非在发票环节对账。对 AI 初创企业永久免费。
products.description: Stigg is the usage runtime for AI products: the real-time enforcement and governance layer between your app and your billing stack. It decides what every customer, user, team, and agent can do, the moment they try. Millisecond credit checks, zero overdraft, enterprise governance, and modular BYOC. Metering, credits, entitlements, and governance in one runtime. Enforce in the request path instead of reconciling on the invoice. Free forever for AI startups.

products.name: Browser Notes
products.tagline: Your ideas, organized - not uploaded
products.summaryZh: 你的想法，整理有序——无需上传
products.descriptionZh: 笔记常常散落在写作应用、便签板和思维导图工具中，而你的私人想法却被推送到云端。Browser Notes 将笔记、便签和思维导图整合到一个本地优先的工作空间。无需账户、无追踪、无强制同步。它支持离线使用，所有数据存储在浏览器中，并允许你随时备份。
products.description: Notes are often scattered across writing apps, sticky boards, and mind-mapping tools, while your private ideas are pushed to the cloud. Browser Notes brings notes, sticky notes, and mind maps into one local-first workspace. No account, no tracking, and no forced sync. It works offline, stores everything in your browser, and lets you back up your data anytime.

products.name: Loot
products.tagline: Collect your favorite things in real life
products.summaryZh: 在现实生活中收集你喜爱的事物
products.descriptionZh: 收集现实生活中的心爱之物。对准相机按下快门——Loot 会识别、抠图，并自动归入对应收藏。然后与朋友分享。
products.description: Collect your favorite things in real life. Point your camera and tap the shutter — Loot recognizes it, cuts it out, and sorts it into the right collection. Then share with friends.

products.name: Folderly Lens
products.tagline: Domain health analysis for high performance email campaigns
products.summaryZh: 高性能邮件营销活动的域名健康分析
products.descriptionZh: 多数人正用受损域名运行邮件营销活动却不自知。现在你可以快速轻松地查明真相。Folderly Lens 会检查公共 DNS、身份验证、MX、IP 反向 DNS 及黑名单信号，随后给出“KILL / REHAB / KEEP”判定结果，并附带可复制的修复方案。无需注册、无需邮箱访问权限、无需发送测试邮件。
products.description: Most people are running email campaigns with damaged domains and they don't know it. Now you can find out quickly and easily. Folderly Lens checks public DNS, authentication, MX, IP rDNS, and blacklist signals, then returns a KILL / REHAB / KEEP verdict with a copyable fix plan. No signup, no mailbox access, no test sends.
